features.title: API Foundation And Route Test Harness
features.description: Establish the shared API helper surface and test harness for Phase 2 Web routes without prematurely implementing auth or business endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: apps/web/src/lib/api/response.ts provides shared success and error response helpers.
apps/web/src/lib/api/errors.ts provides a typed API error-code surface.
apps/web/src/lib/api/request.ts provides readJsonBody, requireString, optionalString, and parseCurrentActor.
apps/web/src/lib/api/pagination.ts provides reusable pagination parsing helpers as needed by the implementation.
apps/web/__tests__/api/response.test.ts and request.test.ts are written test-first and pass.
pnpm check passes or any environment-only exception is explicitly recorded.
No unrelated files from prior changes are modified.
definition_of_done: Required verification items pass or have documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
